title: astragalus fragifer
intro: Astragalus fragifer, also known as the strawberry milk vetch or strawberry trefoil, is a perennial legume plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body to resist stress and promote overall well-being. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Astragalus fragifer is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
